message:
fix: show full session ID, resume hint on stderr, /compact when idle

- Remove .slice(0, 8) truncation from session ID display everywhere
  (status bar, session picker, /status command, resume message)
- Print resume hint to stderr instead of stdout
- Store pending compaction flag on controller so /compact while idle
  applies to the next agent run

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
